gpt55_review_summary: Pasteur the 3rd approved/clean with no merge-blocking findings; reviewed payload env-var mapping, runner parameter stability, templates, docs, and tests.
scope: document_kv_cache.databricks_job, legacy compatibility wrapper validation, V1 Databricks bundle templates, docs, and Databricks job tests.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Added optional native vLLM/SGLang probe delegate factory support to full V1 Databricks benchmark job payloads and bundle templates.
why: Benchmark plans that use Cachet built-in reserved native probe factories need backend-owned adapter factory paths available on Databricks clusters without changing runner arguments.
